literal: to tell someone to perform a sexual act on their mother
to work hard; to get to work on a task with effort and determination
to live off others or rely on others' resources without contributing
to ride closely behind another cyclist or vehicle to take advantage of reduced wind resistance
to perform oral sex on someone

relabelled_senses.definition: An emphatic expression meaning a very large, indefinite number; used as hyperbole to indicate 'many' or 'a whole lot'.
A very narrow, slender waist, likened to the thinness of a wasp's waist; used to describe a pronouncedly slim midsection.
An ordinary or average member of the public; a private individual without official position or special status.
To call out to God in prayer or supplication; to implore divine help or intervention.
To cry out to heaven or to God for help, justice, or intervention.
A humble, old, slow, or uncomfortable means of transport; a low‑status or inefficient vehicle or option.
Side by side; standing or moving very close together (literally elbow to elbow).
To treat information with caution or skepticism; to accept something only tentatively or with reservations.
To confront a difficult problem or situation directly and decisively rather than avoiding it.
To seize, control, or dominate someone by force or intimidation.
To be excessively sensitive or easily offended by slight or trivial matters.
To deceive or trick someone into accepting something false or into allowing something to happen.
To intentionally miss or skip a scheduled class without permission; to play truant.
To retire from an occupation, profession, or activity; to stop working in a particular role.
To retire from boxing or another combat sport; to stop competing as a fighter.
